ddls:
CREATE TABLE "hotels" (
  "hotel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hotel */,
  "hotel_name" TEXT /* Name of the hotel */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the hotel (e.g., Bageshwar, Bhimtal) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the hotel */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the hotel */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the hotel */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the hotel */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the hotel */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the hotel */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* Amenities available at the hotel (e.g., pool, gym, spa) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the hotel's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the hotel's location */,
  "star_rating" INTEGER /* Star rating of the hotel */,
  "check_in_time" TEXT /* Standard check-in time for the hotel */,
  "check_out_time" TEXT /* Standard check-out time for the hotel */,
  "images" TEXT /* List of images of the hotel */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL to a promotional video of the hotel */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the hotel's social media profiles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hotel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "user_profile" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile */,
  "user_location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., guest, manager, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "profile_image" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile image */,
  "language_preferences" TEXT /* Preferred languages of the user */,
  "notifications_enabled" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if notifications are enabled for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "hotel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hotel the review is for */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (out of 50) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review was last updated */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the review is anonymous */,
  "verified_stay" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the review is from a verified stay */,
  "review_type" TEXT /* Type of the review (e.g., text, video, photo) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_hotel_id FOREIGN KEY ("hotel_id") REFERENCES hotels ("hotel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "hotel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hotel the staff member works at */,
  "staff_name" TEXT /* Full name of the staff member */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the staff member (e.g., Manager, Chef, Receptionist) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the staff member */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the staff member */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date when the staff member was hired */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date when the staff member was terminated (if applicable) */,
  "performance_score" REAL /* Performance score of the staff member */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the staff member's profile image */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the staff member's social media profiles */,
  "training_completed" INTEGER /* Number of training programs completed by the staff member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staff_hotel_id FOREIGN KEY ("hotel_id") REFERENCES hotels ("hotel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff_reviews" (
  "staff_review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff review */,
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* ID of the staff member the review is for */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (out of 50) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review was last updated */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the review is anonymous */,
  "verified_stay" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the review is from a verified stay */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staff_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staff_reviews_staff_id FOREIGN KEY ("staff_id") REFERENCES staff ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "amenities" (
  "amenity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each amenity */,
  "hotel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hotel the amenity is available at */,
  "amenity_name" TEXT /* Name of the amenity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the amenity */,
  "availability" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the amenity is currently available */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the amenity */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the amenity (e.g., maximum number of people for a pool) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("amenity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_amenities_hotel_id FOREIGN KEY ("hotel_id") REFERENCES hotels ("hotel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bookings" (
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each booking */,
  "hotel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hotel the booking is for */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the booking */,
  "check_in_date" TEXT /* Check-in date for the booking */,
  "check_out_date" TEXT /* Check-out date for the booking */,
  "num_guests" INTEGER /* Number of guests in the booking */,
  "room_type" TEXT /* Type of room booked (e.g., Single, Double, Suite) */,
  "booking_status" TEXT /* Status of the booking (e.g., Confirmed, Canceled, Pending) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the booking was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the booking was last updated */,
  "special_requests" TEXT /* Special requests made by the guest */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the booking */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status of the booking (e.g., Paid, Unpaid) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("booking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_hotel_id FOREIGN KEY ("hotel_id") REFERENCES hotels ("hotel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "guest_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each guest preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user whose preferences are stored */,
  "hotel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hotel the preferences are for */,
  "room_type_preference" TEXT /* Preferred type of room (e.g., Single, Double, Suite) */,
  "amenity_preferences" TEXT /* Preferred amenities (e.g., Pool, Gym) */,
  "check_in_time_preference" TEXT /* Preferred check-in time (e.g., Early, Standard, Late) */,
  "check_out_time_preference" TEXT /* Preferred check-out time (e.g., Early, Standard, Late) */,
  "last_visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the last visit to the hotel */,
  "num_visits" INTEGER /* Number of visits to the hotel */,
  "dietary_preferences" TEXT /* Dietary preferences of the guest */,
  "special_needs" TEXT /* Special needs of the guest */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_guest_preferences_hotel_id FOREIGN KEY ("hotel_id") REFERENCES hotels ("hotel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_guest_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review the rating is part of */,
  "aspect" TEXT /* Aspect being rated (e.g., Location, Service, Food) */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score given for the aspect (out of 50) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating was last updated */,
  "aspect_type" TEXT /* Type of the aspect being rated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., guest, manager, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being assigned a role */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role being assigned */,
  "assigned_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was assigned */,
  "assigned_by" TEXT /* User who assigned the role */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the role assignment expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
